entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, recommended to build a neutral talent database for superior matching

entities.name: Pure Talent profile
entities.context: A candidate profile generated independent of specific job applications, considered more honest and universally applicable

entities.name: Angling incentive
entities.context: The tendency for candidates to tailor responses to fit a specific role, which corrupts data fidelity

entities.name: Incentive structures dictate data integrity
entities.context: Principle that when rewards are tied to data points, subjects optimize for reward rather than accuracy

entities.name: Observation under pressure distorts the subject
entities.context: Foundational principle that removing transactional pressure restores signal purity

entities.name: Neutral talent database
entities.context: Proposed approach for Careerspan—collect data decoupled from specific job applications for better long-term retention and fit

relationships.context: Strategic recommendation for Careerspan to prioritize this approach over job-specific data collection
Pure Talent profiles are generated by removing the angling incentive
This principle explains why decoupled data collection produces higher fidelity profiles

relationships.from: Observation under pressure distorts the subject
relationships.context: The observation principle is the foundational reasoning behind the incentive structure insight
